locator.quote: strictly non-positive, so a random policy accumulates negative

text: The obvious drawdown term −ε·max(peak−current,0)/budget is strictly non-positive, so a random policy accumulates negative shaped reward and 'bet less' looks strictly better.

locator.quote: This is the same asymmetric-shaping bug the

text: This is the same asymmetric-shaping bug the phantom-profit investigation spent a whole session fixing.

locator.quote: Reflection symmetry is the cheapest zero-mean tool.

text: Reflection symmetry is the cheapest zero-mean tool: (2·day_pnl−peak−trough)/budget cancels algebraically under X→−X (peak↔−trough), enabling an exact-cancellation test; requires peak_0=trough_0=0.
